title: ONLINE DENTIST LOCATOR - 211info
text: CENTERS FOR MEDICARE & MEDICAID SERVICES ONLINE DENTIST LOCATOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a locator tool to find local dentists that serve children. 7500 Security Boulevard Baltimore, MD 21244 Eligibility: Ages 0-19 with Medicaid coverage Hours: Not applicable - (877) 543-7669 1-877 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Toll-free (877) 543-7669 1-877-KIDS-NOW INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Dental Care Referrals * Medicaid Recipients * Children Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - MEDICAID.GOV HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - MEDICARE.GOV If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTERS FOR MEDICARE & MEDICAID SERVICES
